dict.string: Agent Forge sends your iMessages and texts through the Messages app on your behalf.
Agent Forge matches phone numbers and emails in your conversations to names from your contacts.
Agent Forge shows and manages your calendar events on your behalf.
Docent shows and manages your reminders and to-dos on your behalf.
Docent uses Bluetooth for security keys and Passkey authentication.
Docent uses Bluetooth for security keys and Passkey authentication.
